- What changed
- Why it changed
- Main files touched

- [ ] Required checks passed

## Checklist
- [ ] Branch name follows configured pattern (default <lane>/<issue-number>-<slug>)
- [ ] Issue has required labels and sections
- [ ] Paths changed are covered by write-set
- [ ] Parent and child task status is consistent when applicable
